purpose: Evaluate mid-tier model suitability for routine retail recommendations where the decision is reversible or bounded, deterministic checks catch hard constraints, and the model must produce a concise action with guardrails rather than a full strategic judgment memo.
design_principles: Use medium-risk decisions where a mid model should beat rules but not require frontier reasoning.
Include enough numeric structure to punish generic recommendations.
Require a specific bounded action, not a vague watch item.
Reward escalation only when the routine case stops being routine.
Keep decisions reversible or limited in business downside.

forbidden_behaviors: escalate every routine case by default

criteria: Matches action scale to decision value and downside.
Uses supplied capacity, OTB, pack, or margin checks.
Does not recommend an action that violates a hard guardrail.
Uses the most relevant sales, inventory, margin, and timing signals.
Provides an executable quantity, depth, segment, or timing.
States the next read or rollback condition.
Uses appropriate confidence and escalation stance.

items.title: Low-Risk Toner Ecommerce Rebalance

input.facts: Toner T-44 is 160 percent to plan ecommerce, 98 percent to plan stores. Ecommerce cover is 0.8 weeks; stores have 3.2 weeks. Transfer cost is low. Minimum store cover after transfer is 2.4 weeks. Suggested transfer pool is 420 units.

items.question: Recommend a routine channel rebalance quantity and next read.

expected_output.recommended_action: transfer 300-420 units from stores to ecommerce
constraints_checked: store cover remains at or above 2.4 weeks
expected_output.next_read: review ecommerce cover and store sell-through after 7 days

escalation_triggers: store cover would fall below 2.4 weeks
items.ambiguity_type: bounded planning action with imperfect reads
items.expected_failure_mode: The answer gives a plausible action without checking inventory, timing, or confidence boundaries.
items.scoring_rationale: Score should reward bounded actionability, causal reasoning, deterministic controls, and escalation discipline.

items.title: Standard Candle Markdown Step

input.facts: Fall candle C-14 has 9.5 weeks of supply with 5 selling weeks left. Sell-through is 58 percent versus 70 percent plan. Current margin allows up to 20 percent off while staying above markdown budget. Last 15 percent event lifted units 1.3x but not enough to clear. No quality issue.

items.question: Recommend a routine markdown action and guardrail.

expected_output.recommended_action: take a 20 percent markdown or targeted 20 percent event
constraints_checked: markdown budget permits up to 20 percent
expected_output.next_read: sell-through after one week; escalate if clearance trajectory still misses exit

must_not_include: hold price without addressing exit risk
escalation_triggers: clearance trajectory still misses exit after one week
items.ambiguity_type: bounded planning action with imperfect reads
items.expected_failure_mode: The answer gives a plausible action without checking inventory, timing, or confidence boundaries.
items.scoring_rationale: Score should reward bounded actionability, causal reasoning, deterministic controls, and escalation discipline.

items.title: Girls Fleece Size Allocation Tune

input.facts: Girls fleece GF-77 has 1,200 units arriving. Cluster A is selling 130 percent to plan and short sizes M/L. Cluster B is 84 percent to plan and heavy in XL. Pack multiple is 6 by size. Proposed tune shifts 180 M/L units from Cluster B allocation to Cluster A while leaving B above 6 weeks cover.

items.question: Recommend whether to apply the routine allocation tune.

expected_output.recommended_action: apply the 180 unit M/L shift to Cluster A if pack multiples by size are preserved
constraints_checked: Cluster B remains above 6 weeks cover

escalation_triggers: Cluster B falls below cover floor

items.title: Berry Weather Spike With DC Capacity

items.question: Recommend the bounded next planning action and state the guardrails that must be checked.

expected_output.recommended_action: take a bounded, controlled action rather than a blanket move
expected_output.quantity_or_depth: cap action to stores or units passing the deterministic controls
expected_output.rationale: Berry Weather Spike With DC Capacity has upside, but the action is constrained by cold-chain capacity check, late inbound check.
expected_output.next_read: re-check controls after the next receipt, demand read, or risk signal.

escalation_triggers: cold-chain capacity exceeds safe receiving limit
